title: Avoid unnecessary pass statements
description: Unnecessary pass statements can make the code harder to understand and may lead to potential errors.

noncompliant.description: Unnecessary pass statement inside a loop

compliant.description: Avoidable pass statement wrapped in a condition
Avoidable pass statement replaced with a function call

why_is_this_an_issue: Unnecessary pass statements can make the code harder to understand, potentially leading to errors.
how_to_fix: Remove the unnecessary pass statement and replace it with appropriate code.
